examples: I sign the card with my handprint.
I get another idea. I sign the card with my handprint.
I also grew up making those silly handprint turkeys in art classes at school.
INSPASS. Only if the biometric stored on the card matches the user's handprint is access granted.
The glossy, handprint-friendly, dust-magnet finish on the GamePad isn't helping its looks, either (we prefer the matte finish on the GamePad's rear).
